analysis: The night of the 14th into the 15th was a wreck — you didn't get down until nearly 1am and pulled maybe 4 hours of fragmented sleep, with three wake-ups and barely any deep, which is the kind of night that makes everything feel like wading through concrete the next day. Then on the evening of the 15th you got a short but actually decent chunk down around 9:14pm, with a solid 33 minutes of deep sleep in there, which tells me your body knows exactly what it wants when you give it the chance. The early bedtime attempt on the 15th is the real win — that's the version of you we're building toward. The gap is just getting that earlier start to stick on the nights before the late ones, because your deep sleep responds beautifully when you do.
